The '''Pan-preneur''' were [[Amphibian/Legends|amphibious]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] indigenous to [[Sonn Vilmari]]. They resembled many other [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] races, and were believed to be distantly related genetically to the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]], though many aquatic [[Species/Legends|species]] shared similar genetics.<ref name="yard" />

{{Species-stub}}
